EUR.note: ECB monthly average; canonical math uses local_per_USD = 1/closeUsdPerLocal

AUD.note: LOCAL per USD = (LOCAL per EUR) / (USD per EUR); ECB monthly average

CAD.note: LOCAL per USD = (LOCAL per EUR) / (USD per EUR); ECB monthly average

MXN.note: LOCAL per USD = (LOCAL per EUR) / (USD per EUR); ECB monthly average

BRL.note: BCB PTAX daily aggregated to monthly close; canonical BRL_per_USD = native PTAX
